zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham於大約1145年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾米德勒哈姆時，他的父親Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys66歲，母親Agatha de Brus52歲。他和Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1193年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham于大约1145年出生在英国英格兰越可爾米德勒哈姆时，他的父亲Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys66岁，母亲Agatha de Brus52岁。他和Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1193年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham was born about 1145, in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys, was 66 and his mother, Agatha de Brus, was 52. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham. He died in 1193, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham est né environ 1145, à Middleham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Brus, avait 52 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham. Il est décédé en 1193, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham um 1145 in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys 66 und seine Mutter Agatha de Brus 52. Er hatte mit Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1193 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham è nato il circa 1145 nel Middleham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Agatha de Brus, aveva 52 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham. Morì nel 1193, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middlehamが約1145年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハムで生まれた時，父Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboysは66歳，母Agatha de Brusは52歳であった。彼はHelewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverhamとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1193年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미들레함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Agatha de Brus(은)는 52세였다. 그는 Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1193년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Brus, tinha 52 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham. Ele faleceu em 1193, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham родился около 1145 г. в местности миддлэам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Brus, 52. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham. Он умер в 1193 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham nació aproximadamente 1145, en Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Agatha de Brus, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham. Murió en 1193, a la edad de 49 años.
